question: [File: 'File Name: graphql/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/graphql/GraphqlApplication.java -> Scope: Medium: Incorrect or missing records exported to mirror nodes'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user trigger the Spring Boot application to start with a misconfigured CommonConfiguration import by supplying crafted environment variables, causing incorrect entity records to be exported to the mirror node?
